markets.no_sub_title: Derik Queen
markets.rules_primary: If Derik Queen records a Triple Double in the Los Angeles C at New Orleans professional basketball game originally scheduled for Mar 19, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Statistics are considered final at the conclusion of the specified time period of the basketball game. Statistics that count towards a triple double include points, rebounds, assists, blocks, and steals. Any combination of 10+ in 3 or more of these statistics results in a triple double. Corrections made after the game ends will not affect resolution. Statistics recorded during both regulation time and overtime count unless the time period specifies otherwise (e.g., "regulation only").
